news.t: GMO Launches GMO Beyond China ETF (NYSE: BCHI) Focused on Global Supply Chain Shifts

holdings.infoBox: BCHI is an equity ETF with a total of 112 individual holdings. The top holdings are Samsung Electronics stock at 14.00%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 10.93%, MediaTek at 4.81%, Delta Electronics at 4.79%, and CEMEX at 3.08%.

overview.description: The GMO Beyond China ETF (BCHI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed to invest in equity securities of any market capitalization from emerging markets, with the exemption of China. BCHI was launched on Feb 12, 2025 and is issued by GMO.

holdings.n: Krung Thai Bank PCL Units Non-Voting Depository Receipt

data.title: GMO Launches GMO Beyond China ETF (NYSE: BCHI) Focused on Global Supply Chain Shifts
data.text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--GMO launches actively-managed GMO Beyond China ETF (BCHI), designed to capitalize on the significant shift in global supply chains away from China.
